prd.title: Credibility quick wins + home fold
prd.overview:
Covers two Freya Work Orders. WO-001 (credibility quick wins) fixes places where the as-built site leaks credibility against the Trigger Map: an unverifiable "live" claim on the Speakeazy case, inflated/inconsistent essay counts, and two home-page bugs (wrong Speakeazy domain, dead "recent writing" links). WO-002 (home fold) is a design change for the highest-impact audit finding: the fold is 100% assertion, so a skeptical VP must scroll past her first impression to reach proof — the deck is rewritten proof-forward and the fold is shortened so the proof below it crests into view.
The unifying technical move is a new essays data file (src/data/essays.js), mirroring the existing slate.js, that ends essay-count drift at the source. Two items are asset-blocked (portrait, Speakeazy artifact images) and tracked here as blocked, not built.

scope.views: Home (/), Work index (/work), Writing index (/writing), Speakeazy case (/work/speakeazy)
scope.platform: New static data file src/data/essays.js. No server/API/DB work — static site.

requirement.title: Essays data file (single source of truth)
requirement.description: Create src/data/essays.js exporting an array of all published essays, mirroring the slate.js pattern. One entry per existing /writing/*.astro page. Fields per entry: slug, title, deck, quarter (e.g. "Q1 2026"), section ("leadership" | "craft" | "ai"). Source the values from the existing markup in src/pages/writing/index.astro (data-title, data-deck, href, the §-meta quarter, and the section grouping) so nothing changes visually. Order newest-first; document the ordering used for "recent".

acceptance.criterion: src/data/essays.js exists and exports an array.
The array has exactly one entry per essay page under src/pages/writing/ (currently 23; excludes index.astro).
Every entry's slug resolves to an existing /writing/<slug> route (no 404s).
Each entry has slug, title, deck, quarter, and section populated.

requirement.title: Writing index renders list + count from essays.js
requirement.description: Refactor src/pages/writing/index.astro so the three section lists and the header count derive from essays.js instead of hardcoded markup. Replace the header eyebrow literal "Thirty essays" with the real count (essays.length). Render each section's rows by filtering essays.js on section, preserving the exact existing markup each row needs (data-title, data-deck, href, quarter) so the search/collapse JS keeps working unchanged.

acceptance.criterion: The writing header shows the real essay count (currently 23), not "Thirty".
All essay rows render with the same titles, decks, links, and quarters as before this change (no visible diff to the list).
The filter/search box and section collapse still work (filtering narrows rows; section headings collapse/expand).
No essay count or row text is hardcoded in index.astro; all derive from essays.js.

requirement.title: Work index pivot count derives from essays.js
requirement.description: In src/pages/work/index.astro, the "Writing" pivot card reads "Twelve pieces and counting." Replace the hardcoded number with the essays.js count so it matches /writing.

acceptance.criterion: The Work index Writing pivot card shows the same essay count as /writing (derived from essays.js).
No hardcoded essay number remains in work/index.astro.

requirement.title: Home "recent writing" cards from essays.js (real links)
requirement.description: In src/pages/index.astro Block 04, replace the three hardcoded "recent writing" cards (which link to non-existent or placeholder pages) with the three newest essays from essays.js — real slug, title, deck, quarter.

acceptance.criterion: All three Block 04 cards link to existing /writing/<slug> pages (no 404s).
Each card's title, deck, and quarter match its essays.js entry.
The three cards are the newest three by the ordering defined in REQ-001.

requirement.title: Standardize Speakeazy domain to speakeazy.pro
requirement.description: The home Block 03 "Live →" link points to https://speakeazy.com; the live product is speakeazy.pro. Change it, and ensure no other speakeazy.com reference remains anywhere in the codebase.

acceptance.criterion: The home Block 03 Speakeazy "Live →" link points to https://speakeazy.pro.
A repo-wide search for "speakeazy.com" returns no matches.

requirement.title: Speakeazy case: make "live" verifiable
requirement.description: In src/pages/work/speakeazy.astro, add links to https://speakeazy.pro in two places: (1) the §00 meta strip "Client" cell — make "Speakeazy.pro" an anchor (target=_blank, rel=noopener); (2) the §05 Outcomes block — a visible CTA link legible on the signature-red background (e.g. "See it live · speakeazy.pro").

acceptance.criterion: "Speakeazy.pro" in the meta strip Client cell is a working anchor to https://speakeazy.pro (new tab, rel=noopener).
The §05 Outcomes block contains a visible link to https://speakeazy.pro, legible against the red background.
No layout regression in the meta strip or outcomes section at desktop and ≤720px.

requirement.title: Home fold: proof-forward deck + inline Speakeazy link
requirement.description: In src/pages/index.astro Block 01, replace the deck text per the approved fold spec. New deck: "I shipped Speakeazy solo — live to real users since January 2026. Before that: 25 years standing up design practice at three startups, two agencies, and a decade at Precocity." The "Speakeazy" word links to /work/speakeazy (aria-label "Read the Speakeazy case study"), styled as a quiet serif inline link (underline) — not a button, not red. H1, eyebrow, and meta line unchanged.

acceptance.criterion: The fold deck reads the new proof-forward copy verbatim.
"Speakeazy" in the deck links to /work/speakeazy with aria-label "Read the Speakeazy case study", styled as a quiet inline link (not a button, not red).
H1, eyebrow, and meta line are unchanged.
At ≤900px the longer deck wraps cleanly (≤ ~4 lines at 375px wide).

requirement.title: Home fold: reduce height so Block 02 crests
requirement.resolution: DESCOPED 2026-06-09 by owner decision: "Drop Direction C, accept as-is." The H1 drives the fold height, so cresting Block 02 would require altering the signature H1 — not worth it, since REQ-007 already places shipped proof inside the fold (finding #1's core). Closed without implementation.
requirement.blocker: Measured at build (Playwright, 2026-06-09): the fold's rendered height is set by the H1 itself (879px @1440, 847px @1280, 767px @1024) — taller than 78vh at every desktop width, so reducing .fold min-height has no effect at desktop. Block 02 cannot crest without changing the H1 (size/line-height) or trimming the deck — both outside this requirement's "H1 unchanged" constraint. Reverted the inert min-height change. Needs a Freya design decision. NOTE: REQ-007 already places shipped proof inside the fold, so finding #1's core is addressed without Direction C.
requirement.description: Reduce the fold's vertical footprint (currently .fold { min-height: 88vh; }) so the top of Block 02 (— Selected work — eyebrow + the Speakeazy "Hero of the slate" card) is at least partially visible at initial load on a common laptop viewport. Start at 78vh and trim centered bottom padding as needed; the target is the crest being visible, verified in-browser — not a fixed number. No animation added.

acceptance.criterion: On a ~800–900px-tall viewport, the "— Selected work —" eyebrow and the Speakeazy "Hero of the slate" card are at least partially visible without scrolling.
The fold still reads as deliberately composed (no cramped overlap of meta line and Block 02).
No scroll/reveal animation was introduced.

requirement.title: About portrait (asset supplied 2026-06-11)
requirement.description: Replace the About §01 placeholder frame with the real portrait. Asset supplied by Brandon: public/images/BrandonEBWard-006.jpg (1200×1712). Rendered as an in a 1px --rule frame at natural aspect (no crop/distortion), max-width 480, right-aligned; placeholder markup + .ph-label/.ph-detail styles removed. Built on branch build/about-portrait.

acceptance.criterion: The About §01 frame shows public/images/BrandonEBWard-006.jpg (HTTP 200, natural 1200×1712, no distortion).
Placeholder "to be commissioned" markup and its orphaned styles are gone; npm run build passes and copies the image to dist.

requirement.title: Speakeazy case artifact images (ASSET-BLOCKED — not built)
requirement.description: Replace the three §04 placeholder artifact frames with real screenshots (ChatGPT PoC, over-architected React build / Vercel error, live Next.js app). Blocked: no source images exist. The REQ-006 live link is the interim substitute. Do not fake images.

acceptance.criterion: BLOCKED — pending screenshots from Brandon.
